w20: Accelerator-optimized instance featuring dual NVIDIA A100 GPUs and high-memory capacity for intensive machine learning and AI inference workloads.
c150: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 2 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 24 vCPUs, and 340GB RAM for intensive AI workloads.
c200: The Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized instance. It features 2 NVIDIA A100 80GB GPUs, 24 vCPUs, and 340GB of RAM, designed for high-performance AI and machine learning tasks.
w150: The Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server instance built on an x86_64 architecture. It utilizes an Intel Xeon processor with 24 vCPUs across 12 physical cores, supported by 340 GB of RAM. The hardware configuration includes two NVIDIA A100 Ampere GPUs providing a total of 160 GB of VRAM, complemented by 750 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core CPU and memory throughput, while LLM inference tasks demonstrate top-tier efficiency, particularly for prompt processing and text generation across various model sizes. The system supports AVX and AVX512F instruction sets for specialized computation. This configuration is engineered for demanding data science jobs, large language model inference, and complex machine learning training pipelines where GPU acceleration is the primary requirement for throughput and model processing speed.
